headline.purpose: Page titles in PageHeader and request detail (heading-sm/heading, 32–36px).

body.purpose: UI workhorse — controls, table cells, form values (field, 15px). Steps up to 18/21px for descriptions and prose.

label.purpose: Uppercase tracked kicker and field labels (2xs, 11px, 0.16em). Counts use 3xs (10px).

shadows.name: none
shadows.purpose: The system is flat. Depth comes from paper tone (cream→parchment→mist) and hairline borders, never box-shadow.

focusRing.name: focus-visible
focusRing.purpose: The only sanctioned 'elevation' — every interactive control gets the 2px blue ring on keyboard focus.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions and entrances.

motion.name: duration
motion.purpose: State-only; users are in flow. fade-in/slide-up/scale-in keyframes; stagger-rise for lists. All have prefers-reduced-motion fallbacks.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.note: Request lists switch from stacked cards to the ledger table.

breakpoints.name: xl
breakpoints.note: Members table replaces member cards beside the invite form.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The page's main action — ink pill, cream text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:44px; padding:0 24px; border:none; border-radius:9999px; background:var(--ink,#001011); color:var(--cream,#fcfbf8); font:500 15px/1.4 'Aeonik Pro',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; letter-spacing:-0.006em; white-space:nowrap; cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:var(--storm,#0f1e1f); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--blue,#007aff); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary, wayfinding action — blue border + blue text on cream.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:44px; padding:0 24px; border:1px solid var(--blue,#007aff); border-radius:9999px; background:var(--cream,#fcfbf8); color:var(--blue,#007aff); font:500 15px/1.4 'Aeonik Pro',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; white-space:nowrap; cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--blue,#007aff) 8%, transparent); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--blue,#007aff); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Decision Buttons
components.description: The decision path — AA-safe green Approve and crimson Reject, side by side.
components.css: .ds-decide { display:flex; gap:12px; } .ds-btn-approve,.ds-btn-reject { flex:1; height:44px; padding:0 24px; border:none; border-radius:9999px; color:var(--cream,#fcfbf8); font:500 15px/1.4 'Aeonik Pro',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-approve { background:var(--success,#125e42); } .ds-btn-reject { background:var(--destructive,#a8281a); } .ds-btn-approve:hover,.ds-btn-reject:hover { filter:brightness(1.08); } .ds-btn-approve:focus-visible,.ds-btn-reject:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--blue,#007aff); outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Labelled input — uppercase label over a cream field with a mist hairline; blue focus.
components.css: .ds-field { display:block; } .ds-label { display:block; margin-bottom:8px; font:500 11px/1.2 'Aeonik Pro',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.12em; color:color-mix(in srgb, var(--storm,#0f1e1f) 80%, transparent); } .ds-input { width:100%; height:44px; padding:0 16px; border:1px solid var(--mist,#c1c4c2); border-radius:12px; background:var(--cream,#fcfbf8); color:var(--ink,#001011); font:400 15px/1.4 'Aeonik Pro',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; transition:border-color .2s, box-shadow .2s; } .ds-input:hover { border-color:color-mix(in srgb, var(--storm,#0f1e1f) 30%, transparent); } .ds-input:focus { outline:none; border-color:var(--blue,#007aff); box-shadow:0 0 0 2px color-mix(in srgb, var(--blue,#007aff) 30%, transparent); } .ds-input::placeholder { color:color-mix(in srgb, var(--storm,#0f1e1f) 45%, transparent); }

components.name: Status Badge — Pending
components.description: Triple-encoded status pill: orange border + ink text + clock glyph (orange is never the text).
components.html: Pending
components.css: .ds-badge-pending { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:4px 10px; border:1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--orange,#fd5321) 60%, transparent); border-radius:8px; background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--cream,#fcfbf8) 80%, transparent); color:var(--ink,#001011); font:500 12px/1 'Aeonik Pro',ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif; text-transform:capitalize; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Parchment panel on the cream canvas — readable as a card by tone, no border or shadow.
components.css: .ds-card { padding:24px; border-radius:20px; background:var(--parchment,#ededea); } .ds-card .ds-label { margin-bottom:6px; font:500 11px/1.2 'Aeonik Pro',sans-serif; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.16em; color:color-mix(in srgb, var(--storm,#0f1e1f) 55%, transparent); } .ds-card-title { margin:0; font:500 24px/1.1 'Aeonik Pro',sans-serif; letter-spacing:-0.012em; color:var(--ink,#001011); }

components.name: Decision Seal
components.description: Signature moment — a flat, status-colored disc with an inner hairline ring stamped when a request is decided.
components.css: .ds-seal { position:relative; display:grid; place-items:center; width:56px; height:56px; border-radius:9999px; background:var(--success,#125e42); color:var(--cream,#fcfbf8); } .ds-seal-ring { position:absolute; inset:16%; border-radius:9999px; border:1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--cream,#fcfbf8) 30%, transparent); }

narrative.overview: Approvals reads like a well-kept accounting ledger drawn on a draughtsman's table: ink on cream paper, every figure squared to a baseline, hairline rules instead of boxes-with-shadows, and exactly one electric-blue stroke reserved for the things you can act on. It is a money tool first — staff scan a queue, trust what they see, and make a decision that goes permanently on the record. The aesthetic is high-contrast and flat: no elevation, depth from three stacked paper tones (cream → parchment → mist). Color is rationed — ink for actions and text, blue for anything interactive, orange for attention/decoration only, green/crimson for status. One engineered sans (Aeonik Pro) carries the whole product, because the tool should disappear into the task.
keyCharacteristics: Ink-on-paper, light-theme-only; flat surfaces, zero shadows.
One typeface (Aeonik Pro) in three weights; tabular lining figures for all money, counts, IDs, and timestamps.
Blue = interactive accent; orange = attention/decoration; green/crimson = status meaning only.
Status is triple-encoded: color + glyph + word.
The Decision Seal is the single signature moment, used once per decided request — never as row decoration.

rules.name: The One Blue Rule
rules.body: Blue means 'interactive.' If an element isn't a link, a focusable control, or an action affordance, it is not blue. Its scarcity is what makes it scannable.

rules.name: The Orange-Is-Never-Text Rule
rules.body: Orange is a border, a dot, a decorative block, or a count chip — never a run of text. Pending status uses an orange border + ink text + clock glyph.

rules.name: The Ledger Figures Rule
rules.body: Every monetary amount, count, ID, and timestamp is set in tabular lining figures so columns align. Money never renders as a float.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at every rest and hover state. The only thing that may visually 'rise' is a focused control, and it rises with a blue ring — never a shadow.

dos: Do build depth from the three paper tones (cream → parchment → mist) and hairlines.
Do reserve blue for interactive elements only — links, focus, outline buttons, action affordances.
Do set every amount, count, ID, and timestamp in tabular lining figures, and store and render money as integer minor units.
Do encode every status three ways — colour + glyph + word.
Do use Aeonik Pro for everything; create contrast with weight and size, not a second family.
Do give every interactive control a visible 2px blue :focus-visible ring, and a prefers-reduced-motion fallback for every animation.
Do keep the Decision Seal to the one moment a request is decided.
donts: Don't add shadows or glassmorphism to convey depth — the system is flat by default.
Don't render orange as text; pending uses an orange border + ink text + glyph.
Don't reach for the indigo/violet 'generic SaaS starter' look, or fintech clichés — navy-and-gold, neon 'terminal green' dark mode, or crypto gradients.
Don't use warm-cream/parchment as a decorative editorial background; here paper tone is structural, not mood.
Don't build decorative dashboards: no hero-metric templates, no gradient text, no identical icon-card grids.
Don't ship a dark theme — Approvals is a daytime, figure-scanning, light-only tool.
Don't reinvent standard affordances for flavour, except the custom Select (native <select> can't be themed cross-platform).
Don't nest a card inside a card.
